idea.title: Battleships Skirmish
idea.hook: Place your fleet, take turns guessing on a daily-seeded board, salvo bonus on streaks. One-screen browser version with shareable result card.
idea.prototype: 8x8 grid, 5 ships of mixed length, vs AI. Salvo bonus = +1 extra shot per turn after 2 consecutive hits. Daily seed determines AI fleet placement so all players race the same board.
idea.mutation_of: Classic Battleships, compressed to one screen with a daily-seed shareable result card.
idea.why_novel: No HTML5 portal currently runs a daily-seed Battleships; the daily-seed framing hooks into the Wordle-style retention pattern.
idea.lose_condition: Player fleet sunk before AI's, or turn budget exhausted

sources.title: Suggested by serra (Tim's friend) on 2026-05-06
sources.snippet: Classic battleships with a one-screen vibe: place fleet, take turns guessing, salvo bonuses on streak, daily seed shared with friends. Quick mobile rounds, shareable result card.

synthesizer_brief: Picked from Tim's hand-curated Games/IDEAS.md unbuilt list when the daily Telegram digest produced no novel signals (channels were quiet that day).
